info.title: Klaviyo API (Beta)
info.description: The Klaviyo REST API. Please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com for more details.

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Retrieve the SMS account for the calling company.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `sender-config:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_text_messaging_configuration_beta.json)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier for this text messaging configuration (must equal the caller's company id).

schema.description: The unique identifier for this text messaging configuration (must equal the caller's company id).

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. List the calling company's text-messaging senders.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `sender-config:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_text_messaging_senders_beta.json)

post.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Create a sender and submit its initial registration. A toll-free number is provisioned in all supported regions (US + CA), so the response is the sender for the requested country and the sibling-region sender also appears in list/retrieve.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `sender-config:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/create_text_messaging_sender_beta.json)

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Retrieve a single text-messaging sender by ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `sender-config:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_text_messaging_sender_beta.json)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the text-messaging sender.

schema.description: The unique identifier for the text-messaging sender.

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Retrieve a sender registration by ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `sender-config:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_text_messaging_sender_registration_beta.json)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the sender registration.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the sender registration.

post.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Create the SMS account for the calling company.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `sender-config:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/create_text_messaging_configuration_beta.json)

requestBody.description:
Create the text messaging configuration for the calling company.

Singleton — a company has at most one text messaging configuration.

post.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Submit a new registration for an existing sender (resubmission).

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `sender-config:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/create_text_messaging_sender_registration_beta.json)

requestBody.description: Submit a new registration for an existing text-messaging sender.

get.summary: Get Messaging Sender Registration for Text Messaging Sender
get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Return the most-recent registration for the given sender.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `sender-config:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_messaging_sender_registration_for_text_messaging_sender_beta.json)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the text-messaging sender.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the text-messaging sender.

get.summary: Get Messaging Sender Registration ID for Text Messaging Sender
get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Return the most-recent registration for the given sender.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `sender-config:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_messaging_sender_registration_id_for_text_messaging_sender_beta.json)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the text-messaging sender.

schema.description: The unique identifier of the text-messaging sender.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the business address.

id.description: The unique identifier for this sender registration.
The unique identifier for this text messaging configuration.

org_prefix.description: Branding prefix prepended to outbound messages for sender identification. Up to 50 characters.

opt_out_language.description: Opt-out instruction text appended to outbound messages.

status.description: The lifecycle status of this text messaging configuration.

created_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the configuration was created.

updated_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the configuration was last updated.

id.description: The unique identifier for this sender registration.

status.description: The lifecycle status of this sender registration.

created_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the registration was created.

updated_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the registration was last updated.

submitted_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the registration was submitted. Null until the customer submits the registration.

decided_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the registration was approved or rejected. Null until the carrier returns a decision.

id.description: The unique identifier for this text-messaging sender.

sender_type.description: The kind of sender (e.g. toll-free, short-code, long-code, alpha).

sender_details.description: Attributes specific to the sender's type.

status.description: The lifecycle status of this sender.

created_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the sender was created.

forwarding_number.description: E.164 phone number inbound voice calls are forwarded to. Null when no forwarding is configured.

sender_identifier.description: The sender's outbound address — E.164 phone number for phone-number senders. Null while the sender is still pending registration.

org_prefix.description: Branding prefix prepended to outbound messages for sender identification. Up to 50 characters.

id.description: The unique identifier for this text messaging configuration.

org_prefix.description: Branding prefix prepended to outbound messages for sender identification. Up to 50 characters.

opt_out_language.description: Opt-out instruction text appended to outbound messages.

status.description: The lifecycle status of this text messaging configuration.

created_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the configuration was created.

updated_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the configuration was last updated.

sender_type.description: The kind of sender to create. Must be `toll_free` in v1.

text-messaging-sender-registration.description: Toll-free verification submitted with the new sender.

forwarding_number.description: E.164 phone number to forward inbound voice calls to. Optional.

phone_number.description: Contact phone number in E.164 format.

address.description: Business postal address for the registration.

business_website.description: Public website URL for the business.

doing_business_as.description: DBA name if different from the legal business name.

business_registration_country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country in which the business is registered. Required for all businesses; must be `US` for a sole proprietor omitting the registration authority and number.

business_registration_authority.description: Authority that issued the business registration number. Required unless the business is a US sole proprietor without a registration number.

business_registration_number.description: Business registration number. Required unless the business is a US sole proprietor.

id.description: The unique identifier for this sender registration.

status.description: The lifecycle status of this sender registration.

created_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the registration was created.

updated_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the registration was last updated.

submitted_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the registration was submitted. Null until the customer submits the registration.

decided_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the registration was approved or rejected. Null until the carrier returns a decision.

id.description: The unique identifier for this text-messaging sender.

sender_type.description: The kind of sender (e.g. toll-free, short-code, long-code, alpha).

sender_details.description: Attributes specific to the sender's type.

status.description: The lifecycle status of this sender.

created_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the sender was created.

forwarding_number.description: E.164 phone number inbound voice calls are forwarded to. Null when no forwarding is configured.

sender_identifier.description: The sender's outbound address — E.164 phone number for phone-number senders. Null while the sender is still pending registration.

phone_number.description: Contact phone number in E.164 format.

address.description: Business postal address for the registration.

business_website.description: Public website URL for the business.

doing_business_as.description: DBA name if different from the legal business name.

business_registration_country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country in which the business is registered. Required for all businesses; must be `US` for a sole proprietor omitting the registration authority and number.

business_registration_authority.description: Authority that issued the business registration number. Required unless the business is a US sole proprietor without a registration number.

business_registration_number.description: Business registration number. Required unless the business is a US sole proprietor.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the sender. Supported values: `US` and `CA`.
ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code the sender is provisioned in.

Klaviyo-API-Key.name: Authorization
Klaviyo-API-Key.description:
Private key authentication for /api/ endpoints is performed by setting the `Authorization` header to `Klaviyo-API-Key your-private-api-key`
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-07-15.pre/reference/api-overview#authentication
